Package i5.cb.workbench

Class CBIva

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • java.awt.Window
          • java.awt.Frame
            • javax.swing.JFrame
              • i5.cb.workbench.CBIva
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.util.EventListener, javax.swing.event.HyperlinkListener, javax.swing.event.InternalFrameListener

    public class CBIva
extends javax.swing.JFrame
implements javax.swing.event.InternalFrameListener, javax.swing.event.HyperlinkListener

    Class: for CBIva
    Function:
    See Also:
    i5.cb.workbench, CBIva, Serialized Form

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void add​(javax.swing.JInternalFrame jif)  
      void add​(javax.swing.JInternalFrame jif, java.lang.Integer layer)  
      void closeCBIva​()
      if no CBEditor is present, then call exitCBIva(); if started from CBGraph and CBGraph is still there, we only hide this CBIva
      void connectToPublicCBserverIfConfigured​()
      If the variable PublicCBserver is set to a value different from "none" then CBIva shall attempt to connect to this CBserver on port 4001 when it is started
      void EnableCommands​(boolean b)
      Function: Enable the Commands in the ToolBar and MenuBar
      void exitCBIva​()
      disconnect from CBserver if connected and close CBIva including CBEditor (if present)
      TelosEditor getActiveTelosEditor​()
      Function: Returns the activ TelosEditor
      if no TelosEditor is activ return null

      • connectToPublicCBserverIfConfigured

        public void connectToPublicCBserverIfConfigured​()
        If the variable PublicCBserver is set to a value different from "none" then CBIva shall attempt to connect to this CBserver on port 4001 when it is started

      • quickConnectCBserver

        public void quickConnectCBserver​()
        try to connect to a local or public CBserver when CBIva is started as a standalone program

      • showLoadObjectDialog

        public void showLoadObjectDialog​()

      • showWebPage

        public void showWebPage​(java.lang.String sUrl)
        Shows a web page, preferably with the standard Web browser. If not possible, then uses the less elegant Java JEditorPane to display the web page.
        Parameters:
        sUrl - URL of a web page to be displayed

      • showWebPageWithoutBrowser

        public void showWebPageWithoutBrowser​(java.lang.String sUrl)
        showWebPageWithoutBrowser displays a web page with a JEditorPane. This is supported by older Java VMs like Java 1.4 and by Java VMs that have no Desktop integration.

      • showWebPageWithoutBrowser

        public void showWebPageWithoutBrowser​(java.lang.String sUrl,
                                      boolean linksEnabled)

      • showLicenseWindow

        public void showLicenseWindow​()

      • getCBEditor

        public i5.cb.graph.cbeditor.CBEditor getCBEditor​()

      • closeCBIva

        public void closeCBIva​()
        if no CBEditor is present, then call exitCBIva(); if started from CBGraph and CBGraph is still there, we only hide this CBIva

      • exitCBIva

        public void exitCBIva​()
        disconnect from CBserver if connected and close CBIva including CBEditor (if present)
